response.justification: While Bogdan has over 15 years of robust software engineering experience and entrepreneurial drive, his profile aligns more with a Staff Full-Stack Engineer than a Director-level Principal AI Strategist. His exposure to artificial intelligence is limited to a recent 6-month role, which falls short of the deep, recognized AI expertise and strategic advisory experience required to drive enterprise cloud and AI platform strategy.
strengths: Meets the minimum requirement of 15+ years of software and infrastructure engineering experience.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative and community leadership through founding GISCollective and organizing technical workshops.
Solid cloud and full-stack engineering background utilizing modern practices like AWS CDK, Kubernetes, and TDD.
concerns: Lacks the deep, recognized expertise and proven track record in AI/ML platform development required for this role.
Does not demonstrate Director-level strategic advisory experience for enterprise customers.
Missing the preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
